mapper.select: SELECT id, member_id, title, start_date, end_date, member_count, is_public, share_access, share_token, default_transit_mode, created_at, updated_at FROM trip WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id FROM trip WHERE id = #{id} FOR UPDATE
SELECT id, member_id, title, start_date, end_date, member_count, is_public, share_access, share_token, default_transit_mode, created_at, updated_at FROM trip WHERE share_token = #{token}
mapper.update: UPDATE trip SET share_access = #{access}, share_token = #{token}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM post WHERE trip_id = #{tripId}

SELECT tb.trip_date AS tripDate, a.title AS attractionName, tb.start_time AS startTime, tb.duration_minutes AS durationMinutes FROM trip_block tb JOIN trip_candidate tc ON tc.id = tb.candidate_id JOIN attraction a ON a.id = tc.attraction_id WHERE tc.trip_id = #{tripId} ORDER BY tb.trip_date, tb.display_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO trip (member_id, title, start_date, end_date, member_count, is_public, default_transit_mode) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{title}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{memberCount}, #{isPublic}, #{defaultTransitMode})
mapper.update: UPDATE trip SET title = #{title}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, member_count = #{memberCount}, is_public = #{isPublic}, default_transit_mode = #{defaultTransitMode}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE trip SET default_transit_mode = #{mode}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.member_id, t.title, t.start_date, t.end_date, t.member_count, t.is_public, t.default_transit_mode, t.created_at, t.updated_at FROM trip t JOIN trip_collaborator tc ON tc.trip_id = t.id WHERE tc.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY tc.invited_at DESC

SELECT DISTINCT a.sido_code FROM trip t JOIN trip_candidate tc ON tc.trip_id = t.id JOIN attraction a ON a.id = tc.attraction_id WHERE (t.member_id = #{memberId} OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM trip_collaborator col WHERE col.trip_id = t.id AND col.member_id = #{memberId})) AND a.sido_code IS NOT NULL
